title: The Fear of God Brings Wisdom
reading:
Wisdom begins where self-sufficiency ends. The fear of God gives us the ability to see life from God's perspective.

Knowledge gathers information. Wisdom applies truth.

The fear of God positions us to receive divine insight for decisions, relationships, finances, ministry, and purpose. Those who fear God become teachable.
reflection:
What major decisions are before you?

Are you seeking God's wisdom first?

How teachable are you?
abide: Grant me wisdom, Lord, and a heart willing to receive Your instruction.
